title: sports-registry — settings
description: Tenant-scoped policy for the sports registry catalog. Small + Medium tiers see a mostly read-only settings pane (indicating the tenant is locked to the platform catalog); Enterprise tenants see the full custom-creation surface.

groups.label: Sports catalog
groups.description: Configure the tenant's sports taxonomy — platform-seeded rows + tenant custom entries (Enterprise-only).

sections.label: Catalog scope
sections.description: How the tenant reads the sports catalog.

fields.name: include_beta_sports
fields.label: Include beta sports in the picker
fields.helpText: When off, sports flagged as beta (early-stage taxonomy) are hidden from the tenant picker. When on, tenants see them + can enroll athletes against beta slugs.

fields.name: default_discipline_selection
fields.label: Default discipline picker behaviour

options.prompt: Prompt the user to pick a discipline explicitly
options.auto_first: Auto-select the first discipline (sort_order 0) when the sport has only one
options.auto_default: Auto-select the discipline flagged as tenant default (if configured)

fields.helpText: Applies across every Wave 3 module's discipline picker (Team edit, Enrollment, Event).

sections.label: Custom entries
sections.description: Manage tenant custom Sport / Discipline / Position rows.

fields.name: allow_admins_to_create_customs
fields.label: Allow admins to create custom sports
fields.helpText: When off, only tenant owners can create customs (a common shape for tenants that want tight taxonomy control). When on, admins can too.

fields.name: notify_on_custom_created
fields.label: Notify tenant admins on custom creation

sections.label: Reconciliation + drift
sections.description: How the system detects + surfaces dangling sport_key references.

fields.name: alert_on_drift
fields.label: Alert on reference drift
fields.helpText: When on, ReconcileSportReferencesJob dispatches SportPrefixResolutionFailedNotification per detected drift row. Off = drift is only logged.

fields.name: drift_alarm_threshold
fields.label: Drift-alarm threshold (rows)
fields.helpText: When 24-hour drift-count exceeds this threshold, health probe `sports-registry-drift-count-bounded` flips to warn. 0 = never alarm; useful during migrations.
